scripts.copy:fonts: mkdir -p internal/web/static/fonts/ibm-plex third_party/fonts/ibm-plex && cp node_modules/@ibm/plex/IBM-Plex-Sans/fonts/complete/woff2/IBMPlexSans-Regular.woff2 internal/web/static/fonts/ibm-plex/IBMPlexSans-Regular.woff2 && cp node_modules/@ibm/plex/IBM-Plex-Sans/fonts/complete/woff2/IBMPlexSans-Medium.woff2 internal/web/static/fonts/ibm-plex/IBMPlexSans-Medium.woff2 && cp node_modules/@ibm/plex/IBM-Plex-Sans/fonts/complete/woff2/IBMPlexSans-SemiBold.woff2 internal/web/static/fonts/ibm-plex/IBMPlexSans-SemiBold.woff2 && cp node_modules/@ibm/plex/IBM-Plex-Mono/fonts/complete/woff2/IBMPlexMono-Regular.woff2 internal/web/static/fonts/ibm-plex/IBMPlexMono-Regular.woff2 && cp node_modules/@ibm/plex/IBM-Plex-Mono/fonts/complete/woff2/IBMPlexMono-Medium.woff2 internal/web/static/fonts/ibm-plex/IBMPlexMono-Medium.woff2 && cp node_modules/@ibm/plex/IBM-Plex-Mono/fonts/complete/woff2/IBMPlexMono-SemiBold.woff2 internal/web/static/fonts/ibm-plex/IBMPlexMono-SemiBold.woff2 && cp node_modules/@ibm/plex/LICENSE.txt third_party/fonts/ibm-plex/OFL.txt
scripts.build:assets: npm run copy:fonts && npm run build:css
